title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners
company: Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Chandigarh location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners!
